title: lastrea pallescens
intro: Lastrea pallescens, also known as the pale Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lastrea pallescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lastrea pallescens are typically made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
